query:
-- Update wallet balance: 200 + 600 = 800
UPDATE credit_wallets 
SET balance = 800, totalEarned = 800, updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE userId = 1;

-- Record the transaction
INSERT INTO credit_transactions (userId, amount, type, description, balanceAfter, createdAt)
VALUES (1, 600, 'purchase', 'اشتراك مبتدئ — 600 كريدت (تعويض يدوي بسبب مشكلة webhook)', 800, NOW());
